title: The Onyx Chalet by Keuka Lake
description: Keep it simple at this peaceful and centrally-located place. Our Chalet is a newly remodeled house on the edge of Penn Yan within sight of Keuka Lake. Seasonal lake views and beautiful sunset skies. A stones throw from Morgan Marine and Red Jacket park. Walking distance from restaurants and a public beach. Master bedroom on main floor with queen bed and access to bathroom. Two bedrooms upstairs and large bathroom. Comfortably sleeps 6-8 people. sunset views.

title: Vineyard View Loft
description: Loft above a tasting room with vineyard and lake views.

title: Downtown Geneva Studio
description: Compact studio steps from restaurants and the lake.
